productDisplayName: W Women Small Flower Pattern Red Kurti
description: Composition Red square-neck kurta made of 100% viscose, has short sleeves with contrast woven panelling and short pin tucks with stitch detailing at the neck that flare out, floral print and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look fabulous in this retro-style kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
